esp8266_mdns_begin.tooltip: Start the mDNS service and set the hostname (accessible through hostname.local)

esp8266_mdns_add_service.message0: Register mDNS service Type %1 Protocol %2 Port %3
esp8266_mdns_add_service.tooltip: Register an mDNS service (such as http, mqtt, etc.)

esp8266_mdns_add_service_txt.message0: Add mDNS service text Service %1 Protocol %2 Key %3 Value %4
esp8266_mdns_add_service_txt.tooltip: Add TXT record for mDNS service

esp8266_mdns_query_service.tooltip: Query mDNS services and return the number of services found

esp8266_mdns_result.tooltip: Get detailed information about mDNS service query results
